message.content:
Build a complete Next.js frontend application for an AI email outreach platform. Here's everything you need to know:

## Working Directory
`/Users/tanishqsingh/Desktop/yash desktop files/projects/outreach-proj/frontend-v2`

## Step 1: Preserve design references
Move the existing files into a `_design/` subfolder so they're preserved but out of the way:
```bash
mkdir -p "_design/screens"
mv index.html design-canvas.jsx shared.jsx styles.css tweaks-panel.jsx _design/
mv screens/* _design/screens/
rmdir screens
```

## Step 2: Scaffold Next.js
Run this command (non-interactive with all flags):
```bash
npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --use-npm --yes
```
If it asks about the non-empty directory, accept/yes.

## Step 3: Build the application

### Design system (convert styles.css CSS variables to Tailwind config + globals.css)
The app uses a dark Linear/Notion-style design with these CSS variables. Add them to `src/app/globals.css`:
```css
:root {
  --bg: #0b0d0f;
  --bg-1: #0f1216;
  --bg-2: #14181d;
  --bg-3: #1a1f25;
  --border: #1f242a;
  --border-strong: #2a3038;
  --fg: #e8e8e8;
  --fg-1: #c9ccd1;
  --fg-2: #7a8290;
  --fg-3: #454c56;
  --accent: #7dd3a0;
  --accent-dim: #7dd3a022;
  --accent-fg: #0b0d0f;
  --blue: #7aa7e8;
  --amber: #e8b87a;
  --red: #e87a7a;
  --purple: #b8a1e8;
  --teal: #7ad3c9;
  --font-ui: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, monospace;
}
```

### App Structure (App Router)
```
src/
  app/
    layout.tsx          - root layout with font imports
    page.tsx            - redirect to /auth if no token, else to /dashboard
    auth/
      page.tsx          - sign in / sign up page
    dashboard/
      page.tsx          - campaigns list
    campaign/
      new/
        page.tsx        - chatbot launcher (create campaign)
      [id]/
        wizard/
          page.tsx      - multi-step wizard
        processing/
          page.tsx      - processing progress screen
        dashboard/
          page.tsx      - outreach dashboard (email drafts)
    api/
      v1/
        auth/
          google/
            route.ts
          google/callback/
            route.ts
        campaigns/
          route.ts      - GET list, POST create
          [id]/
            route.ts    - GET detail
            stats/
              route.ts
            chat/
              route.ts  - GET history, POST send message (SSE stream)
            sessions/
              route.ts  - PUT finalize
            stream/
              route.ts  - GET SSE progress stream
            outreach/
              route.ts  - GET list
              [outreach_id]/
                route.ts - PATCH update
            email-jobs/
              route.ts  - GET list, POST enqueue
        email-jobs/
          [job_id]/
            route.ts    - PATCH status
            send/
              route.ts  - POST trigger send
  components/
    ui/
      Icon.tsx          - SVG icon component
      Badge.tsx         - status badges
      Button.tsx        - button variants
      Field.tsx         - form field wrapper
    layout/
      Sidebar.tsx       - app sidebar with campaigns list
      Topbar.tsx        - breadcrumb topbar
      AppShell.tsx      - sidebar + main area wrapper
```

### Mock API Routes
All routes return realistic mock data. For SSE routes, simulate streaming. Here are the contracts:

**POST /api/v1/auth/google** → `{ auth_url: "https://accounts.google.com/..." }`

**GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback** → `{ access_token: "eyJ...", token_type: "bearer", user: { id: "uuid-1", email: "user@example.com" } }`

**POST /api/v1/campaigns** (body: `{ type }`) → `{ campaign_id: "uuid-1", session_id: "uuid-s1", status: "draft", first_message: "I'd love to help you with your job outreach campaign! Let's start — what role are you targeting and which companies interest you?" }`

**GET /api/v1/campaigns** → `{ campaigns: [{ id: "uuid-1", type: "job_outreach", status: "ready", created_at: "2026-05-01T10:00:00Z" }, { id: "uuid-2", type: "b2b", status: "draft", created_at: "2026-05-02T10:00:00Z" }], total: 2 }`

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]** → `{ id, type: "b2b", status: "processing", config_json: {}, created_at: "2026-05-01T10:00:00Z" }`

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/stats** → `{ total_contacts: 45, total_drafts: 45, approved: 43, queued: 2, sent: 38, opened: 12, replied: 3, bounced: 2, failed: 1 }`

**POST /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/chat** → SSE stream: emit 5-6 token events then a done event with extracted_params

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/chat** → `{ session_id: "uuid-s1", status: "active", chat_history: [{ role: "assistant", content: "..." }, { role: "user", content: "..." }], extracted_params: {} }`

**PUT /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/sessions** → `{ message: "Research started...", campaign_id: id }` with 202 status

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/stream** → SSE stream: emit progress, contact_found, draft_ready events, then complete

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/outreach** → `{ outreaches: [{ id: "uuid-o1", contact: { company: "Linear", person_name: "Sarah Chen", email: "sarah@linear.app", title: "Head of Engineering", source: "apollo", bounce_risk: false }, subject: "Backend Engineer interested in Linear's infra team", body: "Hi Sarah,\n\n...", draft_status: "pending", status: "draft" }, ...more items], total: 45, page: 1, limit: 50 }`

**PATCH /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/outreach/[outreach_id]** → `{ id, draft_status: "approved", updated_at: "2026-05-06T12:00:00Z" }`

**POST /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/email-jobs** → `{ queued: 43, skipped_bounced: 2, message: "43 emails queued..." }` with 202

**GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/email-jobs** → `{ jobs: [{ id: "uuid-j1", contact_email: "sarah@linear.app", subject: "...", status: "sent", sent_at: "2026-05-06T12:05:00Z" }], total: 43 }`

**PATCH /api/v1/email-jobs/[job_id]** → `{ id, status, updated_at }`

**POST /api/v1/email-jobs/[job_id]/send** → `{ job_id, message: "Send queued" }` with 202

### Page Implementations

#### `/auth` page
Two-column layout: left is animated brand panel with aurora blobs, right is form. Toggle between sign-in and sign-up modes. Google OAuth button calls `POST /api/v1/auth/google`. On mock, just set a localStorage token and redirect to `/campaign/new`.

The aurora animation uses absolutely positioned blobs with radial gradients (green #7dd3a0 at 30% opacity), blur filter, animated via CSS keyframes.

#### `/campaign/new` page  
Full-screen centered hero. Animated aurora background. Big centered textarea where user types their campaign goal. Below the input: suggestion chips ("Outreach to VP Engineering at Series B fintechs in NYC", etc.). Above: campaign type cards (B2B sales, Job outreach, Investor outreach, Custom). On submit: call `POST /api/v1/campaigns` and redirect to `/campaign/[id]/wizard`.

#### `/campaign/[id]/wizard` page
App shell (sidebar + topbar). Left rail shows 5 steps. Steps: Intent → Target → Sender → Sources → Review. Each step has form fields matching the design. On "Launch campaign": call `PUT /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/sessions` then redirect to `/campaign/[id]/processing`.

#### `/campaign/[id]/processing` page
Shows 4 agent steps with progress bar. Connects to `GET /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/stream` SSE. On `complete` event, show "View Campaign" button. Also has "Skip to dashboard" link → redirect to `/campaign/[id]/dashboard`.

#### `/campaign/[id]/dashboard` page
App shell. Stats row at top (contacts, drafts, approved, sent, opened, replied). Below: paginated table of outreach drafts. Each row shows contact info, subject, body preview, draft_status badge. Row actions: Approve, Reject, Edit (inline subject/body edit). "Send All Approved" button calls `POST /api/v1/campaigns/[id]/email-jobs`.

#### `/dashboard` page
Simple list of campaigns from `GET /api/v1/campaigns`. Each row shows type, status badge, created date, link to campaign dashboard.

### Key implementation notes:
1. Use the CSS variables directly via inline styles or `style={{ color: 'var(--fg)' }}` — Tailwind is just for layout utilities like flex, grid, overflow etc.
2. Auth state: store JWT in localStorage key `outreach_token`. If missing, redirect to `/auth`.
3. Use `fetch` with `EventSource` API for SSE streams on the client.
4. The sidebar lists campaigns fetched from `/api/v1/campaigns`.
5. TypeScript interfaces for all API responses.
6. No external UI libraries — build it all from scratch matching the design.
7. For SSE mock routes, use `ReadableStream` with the Web Streams API in Next.js route handlers.
8. The app is dark-only — no light mode toggle needed.

After scaffolding and building, run `npm run build` to verify no TypeScript/build errors. Fix any errors found. Finally run `npm run dev` to confirm it starts.

Make sure the app actually builds and runs. The priority is correctness and matching the design system, not perfect pixel-perfection on every detail.

content.text:
Build is clean. Here's a summary of what was built:

## What was done

### Step 1 — Design preserved
All existing files (`index.html`, `design-canvas.jsx`, `shared.jsx`, `styles.css`, `tweaks-panel.jsx`, `screens/*`) moved to `_design/`.

### Step 2 — Next.js scaffolded
`create-next-app@latest` with TypeScript, Tailwind, ESLint, App Router, `src/` dir, `@/*` alias.

### Step 3 — Application built

**Design system** (`src/app/globals.css`): All CSS variables from the spec, aurora keyframe animations, dark-only with Inter + JetBrains Mono.

**TypeScript types** (`src/types/index.ts`): Full interfaces for all API responses.

**UI components:**
- `/src/components/ui/Icon.tsx` — SVG icons including Google OAuth icon
- `/src/components/ui/Badge.tsx` — Status badges with variant auto-detection
- `/src/components/ui/Button.tsx` — primary/secondary/ghost/danger variants
- `/src/components/ui/Field.tsx` — Form field wrapper + `Input` + `TextArea`

**Layout components:**
- `Sidebar.tsx` — App sidebar fetching campaigns list, with sign-out
- `Topbar.tsx` — Breadcrumb navigation bar
- `AppShell.tsx` — Sidebar + topbar wrapper

**15 Mock API routes** covering all contracts in the spec, including two SSE streams (`/stream` emitting 15 events, `/chat` streaming tokens).

**6 Pages:**
- `/` — Auth check + redirect
- `/auth` — Two-column sign-in/up with animated aurora blobs, Google OAuth button
- `/dashboard` — Campaign list table
- `/campaign/new` — Fullscreen goal textarea with campaign type cards + suggestion chips
- `/campaign/[id]/wizard` — 5-step wizard (Intent → Target → Sender → Sources → Review)
- `/campaign/[id]/processing` — SSE progress with live contact feed
- `/campaign/[id]/dashboard` — Stats row + outreach drafts table with inline editing, approve/reject actions

**Build result:** Zero TypeScript/ESLint errors. All 21 routes (15 API + 6 pages) build cleanly. Dev server starts in ~443ms on `http://localhost:3000`.
